Book
Reviews

Unsponsored. Unfiltered. Every review is written by an actual bookseller who finished the whole book.

Literary Fiction · 5★

The Glass Meridian

An extraordinary debut that rewrites the conventions of the literary novel. Breathtaking prose, devastating heart.

Read full review →
Non-Fiction · 4★

Empires of the Ordinary

A meticulously researched deep-dive into the forgotten architects of everyday modern life.

Read full review →
Poetry · 5★

What the Flood Left Behind

Spare, grief-hewn verse that reads like correspondence from the interior of a great reckoning.

Read full review →
Thriller · 4★

The Quiet Architects

A slow-burn psychological thriller that trusts its readers enough to take its time. Magnificent payoff.

Read full review →
